projectDescription: Lightweight npm dataset for airline IATA/ICAO code lookups with Backbone Collection interface.
keyFeatures: IATA and ICAO airline code lookups
Backbone Collection interface with findWhere, sort, and filter methods
Country name normalization and data quality corrections
publicApiSurface: require('airline-codes') - Backbone Collection with airline data
require('airline-codes/airlines.json') - Raw JSON array of airlines
airlines.findWhere({ iata: 'CODE' }) - Find airline by IATA code
airlines.findWhere({ icao: 'CODE' }) - Find airline by ICAO code
airlines.toJSON() - Convert collection to JSON array
airline.get('active') - Check if airline is active
